title: Public Status Page
description: Configure the public status window, aggregation interval, and which groups/models should be exposed.

form.windowHoursDesc: Controls how much history the public page aggregates. Default: 24 hours.
form.aggregationIntervalMinutesDesc: How often the background job refreshes the public snapshot. It only runs after at least one group declares public models.
form.groupsDesc: Only groups with the toggle enabled and a non-empty model list will activate public status aggregation.
form.modelIdsPlaceholder: One model ID per line, e.g. gpt-4.1
form.modelIdsDesc: Only enter model IDs to expose. The public page resolves display name and icon from the local price table.
form.helper: The feature is off by default. Background aggregation starts only when at least one group has a non-empty public model list.
form.saveFailed: Failed to save public status settings

public.emptyDescription: We are preparing the first public snapshot for this page.
